title: Freezable Baby Teether Toys,Water Fillable Baby Teething Relief,Chill Teether for Babies 0-3-6-12-24 Months, Cools & Massages Sore Gums,No Chill Handle,BPA-Free Soft Silicone Infant Chew Toys (Cyan)
features: NOT-COLD HANDLE: Removable hand-held design,Water chill teether provides gentle cooling on baby's gums.Safe-to-chew silicone handle stays at room temp so baby's hands don't get chilly.
WATER FILLABLE DESIGN: Fill with water and put the water part into freezer for 10-15 minutes and then it's ready to use.Offer two water fillable part for long time chilling effectand use.
SAFE TO CHEW: Teething Toys for Baby are free of BPA silicone teether and handle,safe to chew.suitable for babies 0-3 months, 0-6 months and 6-12 months, it’s an essential baby items.

MULTI-SIDED TEXTURED: Multi-surface teething makes this teether perfect for assisting in the eruption of front, middle and back teeth.multiple gnawing soft touch points can better massage the gums and relieve pain.
EASY GRIP DESIGN: Easy grip design and lightweight is ideal for little hands and helps with coordination.Combines exercise for young hands, gums, and teeth.
EASY TO CLEAN: The silicone teether can withstand temperatures up to 392℉(200℃), suitable for water washing ,steaming, boiling, dishwasher.

specifications_table.Material-free: ‎BPA Free, BPS Free, PVC Free, Lead Free, Phthalates Free
specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎Hand Wash, Dishwasher Safe, Air Dry. Do not boil or sterilize.
specifications_table.Additional product features: ‎No Chill Handle, dishwasher safe, frozen for best chilling effect, soft for bitting, water fillable
